data.information:
Temporary shelters have been opened for those displaced by the fires, per Bexar County Sheriff's Office on Facebook. The locations of the shelters are below:

- Sandy Oaks Community Center - 4451 Hickory Haven Dr. Elmendorf, TX 78112
- Mission Espada Fellowship Hall - 10040 Espada Rd, San Antonio, TX 78214, USA
- Harmony Baptist Church- 12088 Old Corpus Christi Rd SA, TX 78223
